cards.title: Supplement Doses
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Vitamin D: 1000–5000 IU/day (check levels)
  • Magnesium glycinate: 200–400 mg/night
  • Omega-3: 1–4 g/day (EPA+DHA)
  • Probiotics: 10–50 billion CFU/day

cards.title: Herbal Doses
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Ashwagandha: 300–600 mg extract/day
  • Turmeric: 500–2000 mg with piperine/fat
  • Berberine: 500 mg TID with meals
  • Milk thistle: 140 mg silymarin TID

cards.title: Special Populations
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Paediatric dose calculation (mg/kg)
  • Elderly: Start low, go slow
  • Pregnancy: Safe supplements list
  • Renal impairment dose adjustments
